mapper.insert: SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at ) VALUES ( #{room_id}, 'GROUP', #{festival_id}, #{owner_id}, #{room_title}, #{room_description}, #{free_location}, #{free_date}, #{max_capacity}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_USER ( seq, room_id, member_id, joined_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_USER.NEXTVAL, #{room_id}, #{member_id}, SYSDATE, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT cr.room_id, cr.room_type, cr.festival_id, cr.owner_id, cr.room_title, cr.room_description, cr.free_location, cr.free_date, cr.max_capacity, cr.created_at, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id ) AS current_count FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'GROUP' ORDER BY cr.room_id DESC

SELECT cr.room_id, cr.room_type, cr.festival_id, cr.owner_id, cr.room_title, cr.room_description, cr.free_location, cr.free_date, cr.max_capacity, cr.created_at, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS current_count FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.room_id = #{room_id}

SELECT m.member_id, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url FROM chat_room_user cru JOIN member m ON cru.member_id = m.member_id JOIN chat_room cr ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cru.room_id = #{room_id} AND cru.member_id != cr.owner_id
